data_note: All hostel data verified from official college websites, Edusanjal, CollegeNP, and direct sources. Fees marked as 'unverified_estimate' are approximate based on third-party sources and should be confirmed directly with the college. Fees marked 'not_published' mean the college has not publicly listed hostel costs.

hostel.allocation_method: Merit-based: IOE Entrance Score + SLC School Location Score + Candidate Location Score

fees.fee_note: Fee was ~Rs 7500 for full 4-year stay in 2017; raised since. Contact hostel warden for current rates.

amenities: Free WiFi (2 LAN ports per room)
Separate bed, table, chair per student
rules: Allocation based on hostel merit score
Priority given to students from remote/outside-valley districts
Application submitted to Hostel Warden after BE admission
hostel.application_process: Submit separate hostel form to Hostel Warden after BE admission. Contact: Mr. Shyam Tamang (hostel staff). Application open for ~2 weeks after admission.
hostel.data_confidence: Medium – structure verified, fees are estimates

hostel.hostel_name: KU Boys Hostel (KUBH) & KU Girls Hostel (KUGH)
hostel.total_capacity: Not publicly listed (limited seats, interview-based selection)
hostel.allocation_method: Application + Interview. Priority to students from outside Dhulikhel locality.

fees.annual_fee: ~170000 (hostel + mess combined, based on KUSMS data)
fees.fee_note: Official fees not published on KU website. Contact the hostel office directly. Medical school (KUSMS) hostel + mess is ~NPR 1,70,000/year.

rules: Fee waiver notice issued for deserving students in some years
hostel.application_process: Apply via KU website when hostel admission notice is published (usually August-September). Download form from https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Yr3nqYEv0kLFlmdnzeTm2TDAHesseeKg or check https://ku.edu.np for latest notice.
hostel.data_confidence: High – hostel existence confirmed; fees are estimates

fees.fee_note: KIST has not published hostel fees publicly. Contact college directly.

rules: Boys not allowed in girls' hostel and vice versa
hostel.application_process: Contact KIST admissions office directly after gaining college admission. No online portal for hostel.
hostel.data_confidence: Medium – existence confirmed; fees not published

hostel.allocation_method: Arranged by TBC Student Services / Operations Department

fees.fee_note: TBC arranges accommodation with local hostel partners. Fees vary by package. Contact TBC Operations: Anju Basnet or Dibya Prabha Jha (Admissions).

amenities: Fully furnished room (single bed, mattress, pillow, linens, closet, study table)
Veg and non-veg meal packages available
rules: Arranged through TBC Student Services only
Students responsible for contacting TBC Operations Dept for availability
hostel.application_process: Contact TBC Operations Department after admission. Contact: Anju Basnet (Operations) / Dibya Prabha Jha (Admissions). Accommodation page: https://www.thebritishcollege.edu.np/pages/accommodation-for-students

hostel.total_capacity: Multiple hostels across 154.77-hectare campus; exact capacity not published
hostel.allocation_method: Department/faculty-wise allocation; priority to graduate and PhD students and outstation students

fees.fee_note: TU central campus hostel fees are very low (government subsidized) but are not published publicly. Contact individual faculty/department offices.
fees.meals_note: Canteen available on campus; meals not included in hostel fee

hostel.application_process: Apply through the relevant faculty office at Kirtipur campus. No central online portal. Walk-in or contact: 01-4331076.
hostel.data_confidence: Low – hostel existence confirmed; no detailed fee/capacity data publicly available

hostel.hostel_name: PU Campus Hostels (via Prithvi Narayan Campus)
hostel.gender: Both (separate buildings for male/female and married/unmarried)

blocks.name: Science Boy's Hostel
blocks.for: Male students majoring in Science subjects

fees.fee_note: Fees not published publicly. Contact PU directly: 061-504046.

amenities: Categorized by gender and marital status
hostel.application_process: Contact Pokhara University administration at 061-504046 or visit pu.edu.np for hostel admission notices.

hostel.hostel_note: IOE Thapathali Campus does not have an on-campus hostel. The campus is centrally located in Kathmandu (Thapathali), so most students commute or rent privately nearby.

nearby_accommodation.tip: Many students share flats near Teku, Tripureshwor, and Kumaripati areas.

hostel.data_source: IOE Thapathali official page + student reviews

hostel.hostel_note: NCIT officially states it does NOT have its own hostel or transportation system. Students arrange private accommodation independently near Balkumari, Lalitpur.
hostel.source_quote: NCIT FAQ: 'No, NCIT doesn't have its own hostel and transportation system.'

nearby_accommodation.tip: Balkumari and Imadol area has many student-friendly rooms for rent. Buses and e-rickshaws available to Ratnapark.

hostel.data_confidence: Very High – officially confirmed by NCIT

hostel.campus_size: More than 20 acres (25+ ropanies) includes hostel buildings
hostel.allocation_method: College discretion; priority to outstation students

fees.fee_note: KEC has not published hostel fees. Contact college directly at 01-5571005.
fees.meals_note: Fresh and healthy meals served; dedicated hostel teaching staff for discipline

rules: Smoking inside hostel area strictly forbidden
Guidance provided to students during stay
hostel.application_process: Contact KEC admissions office after gaining admission. Phone: 01-5571005. Website: https://kec.edu.np
hostel.data_confidence: Medium – existence confirmed; fees not published

hostels.college_name: Softwarica College of IT and E-Commerce

hostel.hostel_note: Softwarica College does not have an on-campus hostel. The college is centrally located in Dillibazar, Kathmandu, which is well-served by public transport.

nearby_accommodation.tip: Dillibazar has many private rooms and flat shares available for students. The area is walkable or a short bus/taxi ride from most parts of central Kathmandu.

hostel.data_source: softwarica.edu.np (no hostel listed) + Google Maps reviews
hostel.data_confidence: High – no hostel mentioned on official website or any source

summary.data_note: Nepal colleges generally do not publish hostel fees online. Always contact the hostel/admin office directly for current rates.
